posts.title: Germany preparing to censor US social media companies, if this isn't stopped it will spread and it will be used against us in 2028

twitter.content:
🇩🇪 Germany’s state media regulators are preparing new rules that could force platforms like X, Facebook, TikTok and Instagram to give greater visibility to “trusted” or “reliable” media outlets in their algorithms.

The proposal is being framed as a way to combat “disinformation”

A football field-sized American flag is being displayed on the Hoover Dam, alongside a light show, to celebrate the United States' 250th birthday.

It will stay on the historic dam, weather permitting, through July 4.

posts.title: Oregon registered at least 1,600 ineligible and noncitizens to vote. Then it quietly stopped the investigation last year and failed to prosecute any non-Americans who voted.

quotedTweet.content: Voting by mail is how we do elections in Oregon, and that’s the choice states get to make. President Trump doesn’t get to control that. This isn’t over - we will keep fighting to protect every Oregonian’s access to the ballot.

linkEmbed.description: Neither the Oregon Department of Justice nor the Secretary of State have publicly announced the results of the inquiries.
linkEmbed.title: Oregon quietly halts noncitizen voters investigation  • Oregon Capital Chronicle
